These affect, among others, the automotive industry, the steel industry and mechanical engineering.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry. [Sector forecast](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/sectorprognoses/index.html). [Industry](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/industrie/index.html). 18/06/2025 • 5 minutes reading. [Albert Jan Swart](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/albert-jan-swart/index.html). Although US President Trump has reversed the extreme increases for the time being, hefty import duties are still in force. These affect, among others, the automotive industry, the steel industry and mechanical engineering. Trump's trade war therefore leads to lower growth expectations for the industry. ABN AMRO previously expected 4 percent growth in Dutch industry by 2025, but now we expect only 1 percent growth.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: Although US President Trump has reversed the extreme increases for the time being, hefty import duties are still in force. These affect, among others, the automotive industry, the steel industry and mechanical engineering. Trump's trade war therefore leads to lower growth expectations for the industry. ABN AMRO previously expected 4 percent growth in Dutch industry by 2025, but now we expect only 1 percent growth. Growth could increase to 3 percent in 2026, partly due to increasing construction production and significant investments in defense.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: These affect, among others, the automotive industry, the steel industry and mechanical engineering. Trump's trade war therefore leads to lower growth expectations for the industry. ABN AMRO previously expected 4 percent growth in Dutch industry by 2025, but now we expect only 1 percent growth. Growth could increase to 3 percent in 2026, partly due to increasing construction production and significant investments in defense. The Lebanese-American writer Nassim Nicholas Taleb coined the term 'black swans' for unpredictable events with enormous consequences, such as the fall of the Berlin Wall, the attacks of September 11, 2001 and the credit crisis.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: Trump's trade war therefore leads to lower growth expectations for the industry. ABN AMRO previously expected 4 percent growth in Dutch industry by 2025, but now we expect only 1 percent growth. Growth could increase to 3 percent in 2026, partly due to increasing construction production and significant investments in defense. The Lebanese-American writer Nassim Nicholas Taleb coined the term 'black swans' for unpredictable events with enormous consequences, such as the fall of the Berlin Wall, the attacks of September 11, 2001 and the credit crisis. Is American President Donald Trump, who turned world trade upside down on April 2 with 'Liberation Day', also a black swan?

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: ABN AMRO previously expected 4 percent growth in Dutch industry by 2025, but now we expect only 1 percent growth. Growth could increase to 3 percent in 2026, partly due to increasing construction production and significant investments in defense. The Lebanese-American writer Nassim Nicholas Taleb coined the term 'black swans' for unpredictable events with enormous consequences, such as the fall of the Berlin Wall, the attacks of September 11, 2001 and the credit crisis. Is American President Donald Trump, who turned world trade upside down on April 2 with 'Liberation Day', also a black swan? According to Scott Bessent, who has been US Secretary of the Treasury since the end of January, Trump is not so much a black swan, but an orange swan.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: Growth could increase to 3 percent in 2026, partly due to increasing construction production and significant investments in defense. The Lebanese-American writer Nassim Nicholas Taleb coined the term 'black swans' for unpredictable events with enormous consequences, such as the fall of the Berlin Wall, the attacks of September 11, 2001 and the credit crisis. Is American President Donald Trump, who turned world trade upside down on April 2 with 'Liberation Day', also a black swan? According to Scott Bessent, who has been US Secretary of the Treasury since the end of January, Trump is not so much a black swan, but an orange swan. At least that's how he joked in 2019, during the bronzed president's first term, probably not suspecting that he would one day become a minister under Trump in his second term.

text: The Lebanese-American writer Nassim Nicholas Taleb coined the term 'black swans' for unpredictable events with enormous consequences, such as the fall of the Berlin Wall, the attacks of September 11, 2001 and the credit crisis. Is American President Donald Trump, who turned world trade upside down on April 2 with 'Liberation Day', also a black swan? According to Scott Bessent, who has been US Secretary of the Treasury since the end of January, Trump is not so much a black swan, but an orange swan. At least that's how he joked in 2019, during the bronzed president's first term, probably not suspecting that he would one day become a minister under Trump in his second term. Unprecedented import duties in force.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: Is American President Donald Trump, who turned world trade upside down on April 2 with 'Liberation Day', also a black swan? According to Scott Bessent, who has been US Secretary of the Treasury since the end of January, Trump is not so much a black swan, but an orange swan. At least that's how he joked in 2019, during the bronzed president's first term, probably not suspecting that he would one day become a minister under Trump in his second term. Unprecedented import duties in force. Although Trump also imposed tariffs in his first term and repeatedly announced new tariffs during his 2024 campaign, the scope and size of Trump's new tariffs are unprecedented.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: According to Scott Bessent, who has been US Secretary of the Treasury since the end of January, Trump is not so much a black swan, but an orange swan. At least that's how he joked in 2019, during the bronzed president's first term, probably not suspecting that he would one day become a minister under Trump in his second term. Unprecedented import duties in force. Although Trump also imposed tariffs in his first term and repeatedly announced new tariffs during his 2024 campaign, the scope and size of Trump's new tariffs are unprecedented. Although the United States (US) had similar import duties almost a century ago, the different economies were much less interconnected at that time.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: At least that's how he joked in 2019, during the bronzed president's first term, probably not suspecting that he would one day become a minister under Trump in his second term. Unprecedented import duties in force. Although Trump also imposed tariffs in his first term and repeatedly announced new tariffs during his 2024 campaign, the scope and size of Trump's new tariffs are unprecedented. Although the United States (US) had similar import duties almost a century ago, the different economies were much less interconnected at that time. Even now that Trump has temporarily suspended the highest tariffs, a 30 percent tariff remains on many Chinese products and a 10 percent tariff on many products from most other countries, including the Netherlands and the other EU member states.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: Unprecedented import duties in force. Although Trump also imposed tariffs in his first term and repeatedly announced new tariffs during his 2024 campaign, the scope and size of Trump's new tariffs are unprecedented. Although the United States (US) had similar import duties almost a century ago, the different economies were much less interconnected at that time. Even now that Trump has temporarily suspended the highest tariffs, a 30 percent tariff remains on many Chinese products and a 10 percent tariff on many products from most other countries, including the Netherlands and the other EU member states. In addition, a 25 percent levy applies to cars and car parts, which mainly affects German exports, and Trump has even increased the levies on steel and aluminum from 25 to 50 percent, with major consequences for the European steel industry.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: Although Trump also imposed tariffs in his first term and repeatedly announced new tariffs during his 2024 campaign, the scope and size of Trump's new tariffs are unprecedented. Although the United States (US) had similar import duties almost a century ago, the different economies were much less interconnected at that time. Even now that Trump has temporarily suspended the highest tariffs, a 30 percent tariff remains on many Chinese products and a 10 percent tariff on many products from most other countries, including the Netherlands and the other EU member states. In addition, a 25 percent levy applies to cars and car parts, which mainly affects German exports, and Trump has even increased the levies on steel and aluminum from 25 to 50 percent, with major consequences for the European steel industry. About 1 billion euros of Dutch iron and steel exports are normally destined for the US, accounting for approximately 10 percent of the total Dutch export value.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: Although the United States (US) had similar import duties almost a century ago, the different economies were much less interconnected at that time. Even now that Trump has temporarily suspended the highest tariffs, a 30 percent tariff remains on many Chinese products and a 10 percent tariff on many products from most other countries, including the Netherlands and the other EU member states. In addition, a 25 percent levy applies to cars and car parts, which mainly affects German exports, and Trump has even increased the levies on steel and aluminum from 25 to 50 percent, with major consequences for the European steel industry. About 1 billion euros of Dutch iron and steel exports are normally destined for the US, accounting for approximately 10 percent of the total Dutch export value. Of the total export value of Dutch products, 8 percent usually goes to the US.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: Even now that Trump has temporarily suspended the highest tariffs, a 30 percent tariff remains on many Chinese products and a 10 percent tariff on many products from most other countries, including the Netherlands and the other EU member states. In addition, a 25 percent levy applies to cars and car parts, which mainly affects German exports, and Trump has even increased the levies on steel and aluminum from 25 to 50 percent, with major consequences for the European steel industry. About 1 billion euros of Dutch iron and steel exports are normally destined for the US, accounting for approximately 10 percent of the total Dutch export value. Of the total export value of Dutch products, 8 percent usually goes to the US. In terms of export value, chemical products (2 billion euros), pharmaceutical products (2 billion euros) and especially machines and electronics (10 billion euros) are important.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: In addition, a 25 percent levy applies to cars and car parts, which mainly affects German exports, and Trump has even increased the levies on steel and aluminum from 25 to 50 percent, with major consequences for the European steel industry. About 1 billion euros of Dutch iron and steel exports are normally destined for the US, accounting for approximately 10 percent of the total Dutch export value. Of the total export value of Dutch products, 8 percent usually goes to the US. In terms of export value, chemical products (2 billion euros), pharmaceutical products (2 billion euros) and especially machines and electronics (10 billion euros) are important. The US is one of the most important sales markets for machines.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: About 1 billion euros of Dutch iron and steel exports are normally destined for the US, accounting for approximately 10 percent of the total Dutch export value. Of the total export value of Dutch products, 8 percent usually goes to the US. In terms of export value, chemical products (2 billion euros), pharmaceutical products (2 billion euros) and especially machines and electronics (10 billion euros) are important. The US is one of the most important sales markets for machines. In recent years, 15 to 20 percent of Dutch machines for the food processing industry went to the US.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: Of the total export value of Dutch products, 8 percent usually goes to the US. In terms of export value, chemical products (2 billion euros), pharmaceutical products (2 billion euros) and especially machines and electronics (10 billion euros) are important. The US is one of the most important sales markets for machines. In recent years, 15 to 20 percent of Dutch machines for the food processing industry went to the US. Machines for the chip industry, such as from the Dutch ASML, also partly go to the US, where since Trump's first term, more has been invested in chip factories with the aim of becoming less dependent on Asia.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: In terms of export value, chemical products (2 billion euros), pharmaceutical products (2 billion euros) and especially machines and electronics (10 billion euros) are important. The US is one of the most important sales markets for machines. In recent years, 15 to 20 percent of Dutch machines for the food processing industry went to the US. Machines for the chip industry, such as from the Dutch ASML, also partly go to the US, where since Trump's first term, more has been invested in chip factories with the aim of becoming less dependent on Asia. Lower investments due to uncertainty.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: The US is one of the most important sales markets for machines. In recent years, 15 to 20 percent of Dutch machines for the food processing industry went to the US. Machines for the chip industry, such as from the Dutch ASML, also partly go to the US, where since Trump's first term, more has been invested in chip factories with the aim of becoming less dependent on Asia. Lower investments due to uncertainty. Many American buyers will be willing to pay the import tax on Dutch machines, because these machines are of very high quality and ensure higher productivity.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: In recent years, 15 to 20 percent of Dutch machines for the food processing industry went to the US. Machines for the chip industry, such as from the Dutch ASML, also partly go to the US, where since Trump's first term, more has been invested in chip factories with the aim of becoming less dependent on Asia. Lower investments due to uncertainty. Many American buyers will be willing to pay the import tax on Dutch machines, because these machines are of very high quality and ensure higher productivity. More worrying is the uncertainty caused by Trump's trade war, which will likely lead to lower investment.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: Machines for the chip industry, such as from the Dutch ASML, also partly go to the US, where since Trump's first term, more has been invested in chip factories with the aim of becoming less dependent on Asia. Lower investments due to uncertainty. Many American buyers will be willing to pay the import tax on Dutch machines, because these machines are of very high quality and ensure higher productivity. More worrying is the uncertainty caused by Trump's trade war, which will likely lead to lower investment. Discussions with machine builders show that previously placed orders are not canceled, but that American customers have been reluctant to place new orders since April.

Discussions with machine builders show that previously placed orders are not canceled, but that American customers have been reluctant to place new orders since April. Trump's trade war could see the US economy face slower growth or even a recession.

text: Many American buyers will be willing to pay the import tax on Dutch machines, because these machines are of very high quality and ensure higher productivity. More worrying is the uncertainty caused by Trump's trade war, which will likely lead to lower investment. Discussions with machine builders show that previously placed orders are not canceled, but that American customers have been reluctant to place new orders since April. metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: More worrying is the uncertainty caused by Trump's trade war, which will likely lead to lower investment. Discussions with machine builders show that previously placed orders are not canceled, but that American customers have been reluctant to place new orders since April. Trump's trade war could see the US economy face slower growth or even a recession. That makes investing less attractive. In addition, it is possible that Trump will increase or decrease the tariff on European products in the coming months.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: Discussions with machine builders show that previously placed orders are not canceled, but that American customers have been reluctant to place new orders since April. Trump's trade war could see the US economy face slower growth or even a recession. That makes investing less attractive. In addition, it is possible that Trump will increase or decrease the tariff on European products in the coming months. In the first case, a previously ordered machine may ultimately have to pay a much higher import tariff - Trump threatened a 50 percent tariff on European products a few weeks ago.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: Trump's trade war could see the US economy face slower growth or even a recession. That makes investing less attractive. In addition, it is possible that Trump will increase or decrease the tariff on European products in the coming months. In the first case, a previously ordered machine may ultimately have to pay a much higher import tariff - Trump threatened a 50 percent tariff on European products a few weeks ago. In the second case, the buyer may pay a 10 percent import tax, which will later be abolished.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: That makes investing less attractive. In addition, it is possible that Trump will increase or decrease the tariff on European products in the coming months. In the first case, a previously ordered machine may ultimately have to pay a much higher import tariff - Trump threatened a 50 percent tariff on European products a few weeks ago. In the second case, the buyer may pay a 10 percent import tax, which will later be abolished. Some Dutch machine manufacturers who are already active in the US with a small sales office or distribution center are also considering assembling there to avoid import duties, although it will not be easy to recruit the technically trained employees required for this.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: In addition, it is possible that Trump will increase or decrease the tariff on European products in the coming months. In the second case, the buyer may pay a 10 percent import tax, which will later be abolished. Some Dutch machine manufacturers who are already active in the US with a small sales office or distribution center are also considering assembling there to avoid import duties, although it will not be easy to recruit the technically trained employees required for this. In specific industries, entrepreneurs must take into account possible disruptions to supply chains.

text: In the first case, a previously ordered machine may ultimately have to pay a much higher import tariff - Trump threatened a 50 percent tariff on European products a few weeks ago. In the second case, the buyer may pay a 10 percent import tax, which will later be abolished. Some Dutch machine manufacturers who are already active in the US with a small sales office or distribution center are also considering assembling there to avoid import duties, although it will not be easy to recruit the technically trained employees required for this. In specific industries, entrepreneurs must take into account possible disruptions to supply chains. The tariffs put pressure on margins in American industry, because American factories often use parts and materials from abroad.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: In specific industries, entrepreneurs must take into account possible disruptions to supply chains. The tariffs put pressure on margins in American industry, because American factories often use parts and materials from abroad. That could lead to disruption in American industry. The US produces medical equipment, vaccines, semiconductors and aircraft, among other things. The chip industry is in any case vulnerable, because this sector is organized globally like no other, and is therefore extra sensitive to disruption of international supply chains.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: The tariffs put pressure on margins in American industry, because American factories often use parts and materials from abroad. That could lead to disruption in American industry. The US produces medical equipment, vaccines, semiconductors and aircraft, among other things. The chip industry is in any case vulnerable, because this sector is organized globally like no other, and is therefore extra sensitive to disruption of international supply chains. In addition, politicians including Trump are intensively involved in the chip sector, such as export restrictions on chip machines, with which the US is trying to keep the latest technology out of the hands of China.

In response to US tariffs, China has restricted exports of rare earth metals.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: The US produces medical equipment, vaccines, semiconductors and aircraft, among other things. The chip industry is in any case vulnerable, because this sector is organized globally like no other, and is therefore extra sensitive to disruption of international supply chains. In addition, politicians including Trump are intensively involved in the chip sector, such as export restrictions on chip machines, with which the US is trying to keep the latest technology out of the hands of China. In response to US tariffs, China has restricted exports of rare earth metals. That could lead to shortages in the automotive, electronics and semiconductor industries.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: The chip industry is in any case vulnerable, because this sector is organized globally like no other, and is therefore extra sensitive to disruption of international supply chains. In addition, politicians including Trump are intensively involved in the chip sector, such as export restrictions on chip machines, with which the US is trying to keep the latest technology out of the hands of China. In response to US tariffs, China has restricted exports of rare earth metals. That could lead to shortages in the automotive, electronics and semiconductor industries. The Dutch industry is expected to grow faster from 2026, partly due to recovery in construction, recovery of the chip market and the expected rearmament of Europe, which can stimulate European industry.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: In addition, politicians including Trump are intensively involved in the chip sector, such as export restrictions on chip machines, with which the US is trying to keep the latest technology out of the hands of China. In response to US tariffs, China has restricted exports of rare earth metals. That could lead to shortages in the automotive, electronics and semiconductor industries. The Dutch industry is expected to grow faster from 2026, partly due to recovery in construction, recovery of the chip market and the expected rearmament of Europe, which can stimulate European industry. Dutch industrial companies hardly manufacture weapon systems, but can supply (dual-use) parts, provided contract negotiations with defense proceed smoothly and suitable locations and sufficient personnel and energy supply are available.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text: In response to US tariffs, China has restricted exports of rare earth metals. That could lead to shortages in the automotive, electronics and semiconductor industries. The Dutch industry is expected to grow faster from 2026, partly due to recovery in construction, recovery of the chip market and the expected rearmament of Europe, which can stimulate European industry. Dutch industrial companies hardly manufacture weapon systems, but can supply (dual-use) parts, provided contract negotiations with defense proceed smoothly and suitable locations and sufficient personnel and energy supply are available. Dutch industry can also benefit from German investments in infrastructure, which can lead to growing demand for construction equipment, cables and electronics, for example.

metadata.source_title: Trade war creates turbulence in the industry

text:
The Dutch industry is expected to grow faster from 2026, partly due to recovery in construction, recovery of the chip market and the expected rearmament of Europe, which can stimulate European industry. Dutch industrial companies hardly manufacture weapon systems, but can supply (dual-use) parts, provided contract negotiations with defense proceed smoothly and suitable locations and sufficient personnel and energy supply are available. Dutch industry can also benefit from German investments in infrastructure, which can lead to growing demand for construction equipment, cables and electronics, for example. More information. Read all the facts and developments in the report '[Dutch sectors highly dependent on the United States](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/sectorprognoses/alle-sectoren/nederlandse-sectoren-sterk-dependent-van-verenigde-staats.html)'.
